forecasts.reasoning: While President Xi invited Trump to China on June 5 and Trump accepted, Trump's phrasing that he will go "at a certain point" implies no firm date has been set. Negotiating teams are only just beginning to meet. Given that today is June 15, there are only 15 days left before the July 1 resolution date. Presidential state visits to China require extensive logistical preparation and protocol, typically taking months to arrange and being announced weeks in advance. With no scheduled date and teams just starting groundwork, the likelihood of a visit materializing and executing in the next two weeks is extremely low.
